highlights.summary:
Quality Austria Central Asia (QACA) is a known training provider of industry-standard certification courses on quality management. The broad spectrum of its high-quality training covers auditing, inspection, and project management. The courses focus on practical applications and are taught by industry experts, catering to both freshers and those in top-level management.

This organisation was formed as a collaboration between Austria’s company Quality Austria and India’s Peacock Global Quality Assurance in 2010. It is a certification and inspection body, as per ISO 17021 standards. This allows it to officially certify individuals and businesses in quality, occupational health and safety, and environmental management systems, including ISO 9001 and ISO 14001.

Many of QACA’s certification programmes are also accredited by global bodies, including CQI & IRCA, FSSAI, and EFQM, which are also its official partners for the Indian region. The training programmes here are generally for two to three days, some of which also include the examination as part of the module.

Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, After 10th Diploma and D.Pharma. Mahatma Gandhi Engineering College fees ranges between INR 92,400 and 2,69,224. The hostel rooms for the students are good, and we enjoyed our hostel life in that.

individual_reviews.title: Placements are average here, but faculty members are very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The college is the temple of excellence for the students.

content.Placements: The placement for our batch is not well, but our senior batch, the placements are good in the leading companies. The companies like Sony, Infosys, Systek, Mahindra, etc., visit the college for the placement. The students got 3-6 LPA package from the companies. Around, 55%-60% of the students got the internship. The average stipend is Rs. 13,000 per month. There is a placement cell, which is helpful to us.
content.Infrastructure: The college is situated in the green campus. The buildings of the college are well-interior. The hostel rooms for the students are good, and we enjoyed our hostel life in that.

individual_reviews.title: Really very good quality of infrastructure is available.

content.Infrastructure: The college is in a very good condition, and the all over infrastructure is very nice and peaceful. The library in the college is good. There are good quality classrooms. There is a very good facility of the canteen in the college. No Wi-Fi is present in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good college for average students.

content.Placements: Recently, several IT companies visited the college for placements. Among which Sony, Genpact, Systweak Support, Vodafone are the major hiring companies. content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi facility is available in college. The labs and library rooms are in good condition. All the necessary equipment are available. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty members, infrastructure and facilities of the college.

content.Placements: There were about 80 to 85 students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 7.8 LPA and the lowest salary package was 3.5 LPA. Many companies recruited the students from our course. The top recruited companies are Google and TCS. Most of the students were not interested in internships. We got the opportunity to be a coordinator on engineer's day.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities that were provided to us were absolutely good. Students were provided with high-speed data, the classrooms and labs were fully air-conditioned and the library was also good. The food quality in mess or canteen was also good and all the students were satisfied with it. Medical facilities were also available for all the students and sports tournaments like cricket, badminton, and volleyball were held every year.
